Adhesive Plastic Sliding Discs in Gray 4 Pack (Set of 4) Add to Cart Four-Day Flash Sale Manzanita 48" Wide Rectangular Solid Wood Fluted Console Table in Brown Oak Add to Cart At a Glance Solid Wood Base Solid Wood Assembly Required Description About This Product Picture this: your compact living room transformed with a coffee table that breathes artistry into every corner. The fluid organic shape creates spacious illusions, making even the coziest rooms feel open and inviting. Ergonomically designed at 35cm height, it perfectly aligns with your sofa for effortless reach to drinks and books. Crafted with genuine walnut-stained ash veneer, each unique wood grain tells a story of natural beauty, while the 2.5cm thick moisture-resistant top confidently holds daily essentials. Minimal assembly means you're relaxing faster, surrounded by tactile sophistication that elevates minimalist to eclectic interiors. This isn't just furniture—it's the soulful centerpiece where artistry meets everyday living. Features Small Space Illusion Design: Fluid organic shape visually expands compact living rooms without sacrificing style. Ergonomic Sofa Compatibility: Perfect 35cm height aligns with 40-45cm seat sofas for natural armrest reach. Authentic Wood Veneer Finish: Genuine ash veneer stained in rich walnut tones highlights natural woodgrain topography. Heavy-Duty Moisture-Resistant Top: 2.5cm thick MDF core supports 30kg of books, decor, or trays with confidence. Tactile Organic Detailing: Beveled edges and irregular contours create sophisticated texture that complements linen and leather sofas. Care-Made Simplicity: Wipe with damp cloth and use coasters for hot drinks to preserve the artisanal surface.
